sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ip_address INET, notes VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_data (id, ip_address, notes) VALUES (1, inet '192.168.1.5', 'Hello World!'), (2, inet '192.168.1.6', 'Test €50!');
SELECT qgramnormalize(notes) FROM test_data WHERE ip_address << inet '192.168.1.0/24';
SELECT id, qgramnormalize(notes) AS normalized_notes FROM test_data WHERE qgramnormalize(notes) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY normalized_notes DESC;
SELECT id, inet '192.168.1.5' << ip_address AS is_contained_by FROM test_data WHERE qgramnormalize(notes) IS NOT NULL HAVING is_contained_by = TRUE;
SELECT id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data WHERE qgramnormalize(notes) IS NOT NULL AND ip_address << inet '192.168.1.0/24') AS count_valid_notes FROM test_data;
CREATE TABLE additional_test (user_id INT, user_ip INET, user_notes VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO additional_test (user_id, user_ip, user_notes) VALUES (1, inet '10.0.0.1', 'Test String!'), (2, inet '10.0.0.0', NULL);
SELECT a.user_id, COALESCE(qgramnormalize(a.user_notes), 'No Notes') AS notes, a.user_ip FROM additional_test a JOIN test_data b ON a.user_ip << b.ip_address;
DELETE FROM test_data WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE notes IS NULL LIMIT 1);
